reason: Has SubagentDrawer section (lines 649-777) explaining the data flow from subagentRuns store + how status/finishedAt/summary fields flow to UI. Sub-agent needs this to know where to add the banner computed (mirrors statusDisplay) and what store fields are already reactive.
Banner reuses --color-tool-error (red, error state), --color-tool-shell (amber, warning/cancelled state), --color-bg-elevated/border. Sub-agent must NOT hardcode hex — uses the token system.

SubagentDrawer.vue uses reka-ui DialogContent (which portals to body). The header (where banner goes) is inside DialogContent — important to verify whether banner CSS needs :deep() wrapping or stays scoped (Vue 3.5 empirical behavior per spec line ~236).
Sub-agent MUST check before creating: (1) truncate helper exists somewhere? (2) alert-triangle icon name already in Icon.vue's heroicons registry? (3) any existing banner component to extend?
